cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Alice is dancing with at the end of the song. So there are these five main dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start with a partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Now, there are a series of partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one to keep track. First switch: Dave and Bob switch partners. So before this, Dave is with Melissa, and Bob is with Patrick. After switching, Dave will now be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me note that down: - Alice:
